goal: Fix the Gemini kickoff skip predicate so post-960c60d verification requests a real Gemini review.
assumptions: Manual commits may mention codex auto-fix and still need Gemini review.
True bot auto-fix commits use the exact subject prefix '🤖 codex auto-fix:'.
risks: Broad skip predicates hide review-loop failures.
Overly narrow skip predicates may request duplicate Gemini reviews after real bot commits.
steps: Add a workflow contract test for the skip predicate.
Narrow gemini-review-kickoff.yml to the exact bot subject prefix.
Push a new commit to trigger a real Gemini kickoff run.
verification: GitHub Actions Gemini Review Kickoff runs after the pushed commit and does not log the old skip message.
